Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Alsa Grayweather]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Alsa is Calder's mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Alsa is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Alsa worked for the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Alsa Grayweather is Calder's mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Alsa Grayweather uses a sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Alsa Grayweather is the commander of the outpost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Alsa Grayweather is the right hand of the Blackwatch Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Alsa carries seven Awakened iron spikes in her coat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Alsa is a character who attempts to Read the heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Alsa was the subject of an initial attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Alsa Grayweather fights using a musket as a club.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Alsa gives orders to the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Alsa Grayweather is the resident of a residence where Calder Marten's guardian resides.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Alsa suggested that Bliss would be back soon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — Alsa offered to accompany Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Alsa Grayweather is a person Bliss intends to return to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Alsa does not trust Calder with the laundry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Alsa Grayweather has a home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Alsa Grayweather attempted to summon Elderspawn for almost two years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Alsa is a person who Awakened a saber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Alsa Grayweather's son had a trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Alsa Grayweather is under the personal supervision of Bliss.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Alsa Grayweather is a Guild member in good standing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Alsa Grayweather is the only one who can bring Bliss back to reason.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Alsa Grayweather is someone Bliss would ask for help.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Alsa carries a saber and a pistol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Alsa Grayweather identified the people as citizens of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Alsa Grayweather is someone Bliss would be hurt by if she had to kill Calder.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
